cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Namaste Bhavana ji! Congratulations, you're eligible for our new UPI service from South Indian Bank. It's completely free and will make your transactions so much easier, sir!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, thik hai. What do I need to do?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Wonderful! Just to get you started, I need you to set a new temporary 4-digit PIN for security purposes. This will be used just for this service, don't worry, it's totally secure, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Uh, okay... Let me think for a second. How about 1-2-3-4?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: That's great, Bhavana ji! Your temporary PIN is set. Now, let's proceed with activating your UPI service. You'll love how easy it makes your life, sir!

slow_thinking_rationale: At 54s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: Social Engineering the "Secret PIN": Agent asks the user to "set a new temporary 4-digit PIN" over the phone for a new UPI/debit card service, effectively tricking the user into revealing a number they are likely to use for other accounts.
